description: Add Vitest testing framework with 5+ meaningful unit tests covering cn() utility, CSV export, API client fallback, theme context toggle, and KPICard component rendering
steps: 1. Install dev dependencies: vitest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, jsdom, @vitejs/plugin-react. Run: pnpm add -D vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom @vitejs/plugin-react in frontend/.
2. Create frontend/vitest.config.ts: Configure with jsdom environment, react plugin, path alias (@/* -> ./*) matching tsconfig paths, and setup file.
3. Create frontend/vitest.setup.ts: Import @testing-library/jest-dom for extended matchers.
4. Update frontend/package.json scripts: Add 'test': 'vitest' and 'test:ci': 'vitest run'.

5. Create frontend/__tests__/lib/utils.test.ts: Test cn() function - merging classes, handling conflicts (e.g. cn('p-4', 'p-2') should produce 'p-2'), handling falsy values, combining with clsx conditions.

6. Create frontend/__tests__/lib/csv-export.test.ts: Test downloadCSV function - verify it handles empty data (returns early), generates correct CSV string with headers, escapes quotes properly. Mock document.createElement, URL.createObjectURL, etc.
7. Create frontend/__tests__/lib/api.test.ts: Test fetchWithFallback behavior - when BASE_URL is empty it returns fallback immediately, test the API envelope unwrapping logic. Mock global fetch.
8. Create frontend/__tests__/lib/theme-context.test.tsx: Test ThemeProvider and useTheme - renders children, toggle function switches theme, localStorage is read on mount and written on toggle.
9. Create frontend/__tests__/components/KPICard.test.tsx: Test KPICard renders label, value, subtitle correctly. Test trend variants show correct arrow icons.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test:ci in frontend/ runs and all tests pass
At least 5 test files exist with meaningful assertions
Tests cover the actual logic (not just smoke tests)
pnpm build in frontend/ still passes (vitest config does not break the build)
verification: Run pnpm test:ci in frontend/ and confirm all tests pass
Run pnpm build in frontend/ and confirm 16 routes still generate
